reviews.review_title: I'm actually shocked.this game is dope🔥
reviews.review_description:
I get slack because I Always keep it real in Reviews, because I think Vr players deserve more good passionate games. Not half baked tech demos 

With tons of  crap VR games coming out I thought your game was going to be another one , especially since you're doing  a mixed reality Augmented game and you delayed lol


I just want to say thank you for this game now. Holy smokes! 🙀 
Happy I gave this a chance now.
The guns work better then some of the regular VR  games 

Lots of guns, and they work well, the story mode is fire 🔥, had me running around my room & you actually turned my room into the battlefield.... OMG 🔥🙀

Had lots of Different enemy  types , different missions with music  etc...made this a mixed reality favorite for me .
 This is what I believe People want to see more of in VR. 

You really evolved from your other fps game

Thank you for caring and being "unique"  

Happy to support this game.
And if this is early access?

Ohh boy, its only up from here!!

I was surprised how well the spiders climbed and crawled on the walls and ceiling. It felt satisfying shooting the walls and furniture too. Some parts were a bit challenging but I was able to get through them. 

I have an idea - you should make an option for the Egypt level- Chapter 2 and Chapter 4 to have a no reloading option like Chapter 1.  

I really liked the portal effect when you go inside and see the worlds.

It's a great game can't wait till you more updates and more to the game more missions More different creatures grotesque rotten face looking creatures keep up the good work. Is there going to be at any demonic creatures like mutated monsters little mutated monsters running around in your house grotesque creatures little mutated demons running around they'll be cool to see  I would love to see terrifying creatures mutated demon monsters chasing you through your house Little creatures crawling on the wall mutated little creatures like little gnomes demonic gnomes keep up the good work love what you're doing having a blast can't wait to see more updates more different monsters or if you can add any monsters cuz I don't think it's any on there besides that weird looking thing that chases you through the house running back and forth when he runs at you he wobbles back and forth something that kind of like that more demonic creatures that was scare you of the sight of seeing them you know mutilated like toxic crusader how he looked at all mutated and gross and terrifying something like that that will make your wet your pants give you a fright when you see it coming cuz it looks so scary and terrifying keep up the good work

reviews.review_title: Man - this game is a workout
reviews.review_description:
Some survival tips - I found running around the house made it easier to kill the spiders.   You have to be constantly looking around all the time. 

Entering the portals kind of reminded me of Stranger Things.   I was a bit worried at first entering the portal but I could see my feet and the floor and the mirror made it easier to navigate around my house. 

Some things to consider - I noticed a few areas later in the game needed some polish but nothing that was a big deal and hope that the developer keeps adding to the game.

The first go around with the spiders was fun.  I was moving around a lot to avoid being bitten.  It was difficult to get past this section.  I would probably make this section easier.  Once I made it past chapter one I really like the portal bringing me into a different place. The use of the Mirror  was helpful being able to see back into my real world space.

It starts if fun and continues down that path. I'm really into mixed reality games and this is a bullseye 🎯.  
  Hopefully it'll have haptic Vest support in the future,  either way it's a fun time
This game was very fun to play. I like how each level is unique with different enemies to beat

reviews.review_title: Try it if you want to have fun!!!!
reviews.review_description:
Keeps you entertained for sure. I loved the simplicity and easy way to play it. I’m not an expert in loding guns and shoot at enemies, in this game I did not have to worry too much about it. 

It’s a fun game that I would recommend you to play. It fun for all ages and genders. 

The egipocian chapter was very challenging. I would recommend to make the helicopter easy to shoot down. 

I highly recommend wearing shoes when playing it.

Highly recommend!

Nice effects on the Flame Thrower.

Looking forward to all the polishing and fine tuning .

Will reserve a star for the final finished product.
